title: Undertake burning for fuel, ecological and cultural resource management
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Undertake burning for fuel, ecological and cultural resource management demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Coordinate on-ground preparations for planned burning

pcs.text: Confirm conditions required to burn with supervisor/burn coordinator
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm conditions required to burn with supervisor/burn coordinator?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm conditions required to burn with supervisor/burn coordinator.

pcs.text: Confirm contingency arrangements and communicate to all personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm contingency arrangements and communicate to all personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm contingency arrangements and communicate to all personnel.

pcs.text: Confirm permits available and valid according to legislative requirements and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm permits available and valid according to legislative requirements and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm permits available and valid according to legislative requirements and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Issue planned burn advice and day-of-burn notifications to stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Issue planned burn advice and day-of-burn notifications to stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Issue planned burn advice and day-of-burn notifications to stakeholders.

pcs.text: Identify, assemble and check resources required with burn team
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, assemble and check resources required with burn team?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, assemble and check resources required with burn team.

pcs.text: Establish and check fire control measures are in place according to burn plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish and check fire control measures are in place according to burn plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish and check fire control measures are in place according to burn plan.

pcs.text: Identify and implement controls to protect assets and values
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and implement controls to protect assets and values?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and implement controls to protect assets and values.

pcs.text: Monitor weather conditions and notify supervisor when conditions are unfavourable for burn
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor weather conditions and notify supervisor when conditions are unfavourable for burn?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor weather conditions and notify supervisor when conditions are unfavourable for burn.

pcs.text: Identify on-site health and safety hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify on-site health and safety hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify on-site health and safety hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Deliver burn day operational briefing to burn team
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Deliver burn day operational briefing to burn team?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Deliver burn day operational briefing to burn team.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Coordinate on-ground preparations for planned burning

elements.title: Undertake burn day operations

pcs.text: Coordinate the deployment of resources for burn
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Coordinate the deployment of resources for burn?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Coordinate the deployment of resources for burn.

pcs.text: Select, check and provide equipment for personal protection and safety according to workplace standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and provide equipment for personal protection and safety according to workplace standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and provide equipment for personal protection and safety according to workplace standards.

pcs.text: Undertake pre-burn checks in accordance with usual burn day operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake pre-burn checks in accordance with usual burn day operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake pre-burn checks in accordance with usual burn day operations.

pcs.text: Utilise ignition techniques according to burn requirements and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Utilise ignition techniques according to burn requirements and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Utilise ignition techniques according to burn requirements and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Maintain communications with supervisor/burn coordinator and burn team throughout burn according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain communications with supervisor/burn coordinator and burn team throughout burn according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain communications with supervisor/burn coordinator and burn team throughout burn according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Monitor burn progress and implement operational changes to ensure burn objectives are met
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor burn progress and implement operational changes to ensure burn objectives are met?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor burn progress and implement operational changes to ensure burn objectives are met.

pcs.text: Conclude ignition according to burn requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conclude ignition according to burn requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conclude ignition according to burn requirements.

pcs.text: Coordinate mopping-up activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Coordinate mopping-up activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Coordinate mopping-up activities.

pcs.text: Implement patrol schedule to ensure post-burn security according to planned burn requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement patrol schedule to ensure post-burn security according to planned burn requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement patrol schedule to ensure post-burn security according to planned burn requirements.

pcs.text: Keep records according to workplace and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Keep records according to workplace and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Keep records according to workplace and legislative requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess outcomes of planned burn.

pcs.text: Report burn operations, outcomes and variations from planned burn conditions according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report burn operations, outcomes and variations from planned burn conditions according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Check cleaning-up activities are carried out according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check cleaning-up activities are carried out according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check cleaning-up activities are carried out according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Confirm faulty equipment, tools and machinery are reported according to workplace procedures
